PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-10-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanette Villajin (Granddaughter) in Propria Persona.

This is a pre-granted matter. Ms. Villajin stated that she is not objecting to the petition. The petition remains granted.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
